case_title: ALLEGRO CORPORATION DBA AD SPECIALTIES UNLIMITED VS GOLDEN RAINBOW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN RAINBOW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $938.38 FILED BY ALLEGRO CORPORATION DBA AD SPECIALTIES UNLIMITED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN RAINBOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEGRO CORPORATION DBA AD SPECIALTIES UNLIMITED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN RAINBOW $938.38 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $985.88, DEFENDANT HAS PAID PLNTF. $938.38 - PER PLNTFS. STATEMENT TO COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
